case_title: GILLESPIE OFELIA MARIA VS WILL MARK DENNIS

ORIG JUDGMENT SENT TO PRO TEMP MARK B. KERTZ FOR RULING ON DEF'S CLAIM.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT WILL MARK DENNIS HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05

POS & ORDER FOR EXAMINATION NOT HANDED IN TIMELY NOT 3 DAYS BEFORE.
